Class-Druid 20 — Male Human Druid: 20
Strength: 10 (+0) Dexterity: 12 (+1) Constitution: 16 (+3) Intelligence: 10 (+0) Wisdom: 15 (+2) Charisma: 14 (+2)
Background: Acolyte Alignment: Neutral Deity: Greek-Tyche (N)
Ability Boosts: Constitution Experience: 494361/1000000 Level: 20 Size: Medium Speed: 30 Carry/Lift: 150/300
Ability Notes:
Human Ability Adjustment: +1 Charisma/+1 Constitution/+1 Dexterity/+1 Intelligence/+1 Strength/+1 Wisdom
Tavern Brawler: Ability Boost (Choose 1 from Constitution, Strength)
Ability Boosts: 1 to distribute
Land's Stride: Can move normally through nonmagical difficult terrain and plants
Features/Skills
Proficiency Bonus: +6
Feat Count: General: 5 Selectable Feature Count: Druid (Druid Circle)
Feats: Elemental Adept (Cold); Elemental Adept (Thunder); Magic Initiate (Wizard); Mounted Combatant; Tavern Brawler Human Features: Human Ability Adjustment; Language (Common; Choose 1 from any) Druid Features: Archdruid; Armor Proficiency (Light; Medium; Shield); Beast Spells; Bonus Cantrip (Circle Of The Land); Circle Forms; Circle Of The Land (Arctic); Circle Of The Land (Coast); Circle Of The Land (Desert); Circle Of The Land (Forest); Circle Of The Land (Grassland); Circle Of The Land (Mountain); Circle Of The Land (Swamp); Circle Of The Land (Underdark); Circle Of The Moon; Circle Spells (Arctic); Circle Spells (Coast); Circle Spells (Desert); Circle Spells (Forest); Circle Spells (Grassland); Circle Spells (Mountain); Circle Spells (Swamp); Circle Spells (Underdark); Combat Wild Shape; Druid Circle; Druidic; Elemental Wild Shape; Land's Stride; Natural Recovery; Nature's Sanctuary; Nature's Ward; Primal Strike; Save Proficiency (Intelligence; Wisdom); Skill Proficiency (Choose 2 from Arcana, Animal Handling, Insight, Medicine, Nature, Perception, Religion, Survival); Spellcasting; Thousand Forms; Timeless Body (Druid); Tool Proficiency (Herbalism Kit); Weapon Proficiency (Club; Dagger; Dart; Javelin; Mace; Quarterstaff; Scimitar; Sickle; Sling; Spear); Wild Shape Acolyte Features: Language (Choose 2 from any); Shelter Of The Faithful; Skill Proficiency (Insight; Religion)
Feature Notes:
Druid Circle: 1 selection
Shelter Of The Faithful: Can receive aid from temples of Greek-Tyche and fellow believers
Timeless Body (Druid): Ages at 1/10 normal rate
Skills:
Acrobatics: (dex) +1 Insight: (wis) +8 Performance: (cha) +2
Animal Handling: (wis) +2 Intimidation: (cha) +2 Persuasion: (cha) +2
Arcana: (int) +0 Investigation: (int) +0 Religion: (int) +6
Athletics: (str) +0 Medicine: (wis) +8 Sleight Of Hand: (dex) +1
Deception: (cha) +2 Nature: (int) +0 Stealth: (dex) +1
History: (int) +0 Perception: (wis) +2 Survival: (wis) +8
Skill Proficiency: Insight; Medicine; Religion; Survival
Tool Proficiency: Herbalism Kit
Languages: Abyssal; Common; Draconic; Elvish
Skill Notes: Druidic: Speaks a secret language known only by druids
Combat
Hit Points: 140 Initiative: +1 Armor Class: 15
Armor Proficiency: Light; Medium; Shield Weapon Proficiency: Club; Dagger; Dart; Improvised Weapons; Javelin; Mace; Quarterstaff; Scimitar; Sickle; Sling; Spear
Armor: Breastplate Shield: None Weapons: Scimitar (+7 1d6+1 S); Sling (+7 1d4+1 B R30/120); Unarmed Strike (+6 1d4 B); Unarmed
Combat Notes:
Constitution Hit Points Adjustment: +60
Dexterity Armor Class Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Attack Adjustment: +1
Dexterity Damage Adjustment: +1
Tavern Brawler: Weapon Proficiency (Improvised Weapons)/Unarmed Strike inflicts 1d4 HP
Mounted Combatant: Has advantage on melee attacks on unmounted foes smaller than mount and can redirect attacks on mount to self
Nature's Sanctuary: Beasts and plants cannot attack self (save DC 16 Wisdom negates for 24 hr)
Primal Strike: Attacks while using Wild Shape count as magical
Tavern Brawler: Can use a bonus action to grapple after a successful unarmed strike or improvised weapon attack
Save Proficiency: Intelligence; Wisdom
Save: Charisma: +2; Constitution: +3; Dexterity: +1; Intelligence: +6; Strength: +0; Wisdom: +8
Save Notes:
Land's Stride: Has advantage vs. impeding plants
Mounted Combatant: Mount's successful Dexterity saves yield no damage instead of half, and failed saves yield half damage
Nature's Ward: Has immunity to disease, poison, and elemental and fey charm and fright
Magic
Spells Known/Prepared: D0: 5; D: 22; W0: 2; W: 1 Spell Slots: D1: 4; D2: 3; D3: 3; D4: 3; D5: 3; D6: 2; D7: 2; D8: 1; D9: 1 Attack: D: +8; W: +6 Spell DC: D: 16; W: 14
Spells:
Alter Self (D2 [Thousand Forms] Tran): (Action) Self becomes aquatic, changes appearance, or gains magic natural weapons with +7 attack and 1d6+1 HP damage, for concentration up to 1 hr
Animal Messenger (D2 Ench): (Action) R30' Tiny beast target moves to deliver a 25-word message to a described recipient for 24 hr (+Level extends the duration +48 hr) [R]
Barkskin (D2 [Circle Spells (Forest)] Tran): (Action) Willing touched gains Armor Class 16 for concentration up to 1 hr
Blight (D4 [Circle Spells (Desert)] Necr): (Action) R30' Kills a nonmagical plant or inflicts 8d8 HP necrotic on a creature (save Constitution half; plant target has disadvantage on the save and suffers maximum damage on failure) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Blur (D2 [Circle Spells (Desert)] Illu): (Action) Foes suffer disadvantage when using sight to attack self for concentration up to 1 min
Call Lightning (D3 Conj): (Action) R120' 5' radius inflicts 3d10 HP lightning (save Dexterity half; +1d10 HP if using a natural storm) once per turn for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Call Lightning (D3 [Circle Spells (Forest)] Conj): (Action) R120' 5' radius inflicts 3d10 HP lightning (save Dexterity half; +1d10 HP if using a natural storm) once per turn for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Cloudkill (D5 [Circle Spells (Underdark)] Conj): (Action) R120' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured, inflicts 5d8 HP poison (save Constitution half), and moves away 10' at the start of each turn for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Commune With Nature (D5 Divi): (Minute) Reveals 3 facts about nature within 3 miles, or within 300' when underground [R]
Commune With Nature (D5 [Circle Spells (Arctic)] Divi): (Minute) Reveals 3 facts about nature within 3 miles, or within 300' when underground [R]
Commune With Nature (D5 [Circle Spells (Forest)] Divi): (Minute) Reveals 3 facts about nature within 3 miles, or within 300' when underground [R]
Cone Of Cold (D5 [Circle Spells (Arctic)] Evoc): (Action) 60' cone inflicts 8d8 HP cold (save Constitution half) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Conjure Elemental (D5 [Circle Spells (Coast)] Conj): (Minute) R90' Summons an obedient environment-appropriate CR 5 elemental for 1 hr; loss of concentration makes it hostile (+Level increases the CR by 1)
Conjure Minor Elementals (D4 Conj): (Minute) R90' Summons a choice of 1, 2, 4, or 8 obedient CR 2, 1, 1/2, or 1/4 elementals for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level doubles or triples the number of elementals at level 6 or 8)
Control Water (D4 [Circle Spells (Coast)] Tran): (Action) R300' Water in a 100' cube rises 20', parts, redirects, or forms a whirlpool for concentration up to 10 min
Control Weather (D8 Tran): (10 Minutes) Adjusts the temperature, wind, and precipitation in a 5 mile radius after a 1d4 x 10 min delay for concentration up to 8 hr
Create Food And Water (D3 [Circle Spells (Desert)] Conj): (Action) R30' Creates 45 lb of food that lasts for 24 hr and 30 gallons of water
Dancing Lights (W0 Evoc): (Action) R120' 4 torch lights each dimly light a 10' radius and can move 60' per turn as a bonus action for concentration up to 1 min; moving a light more than 20' from the others extinguishes it
Darkness (D2 [Circle Spells (Swamp)] Evoc): (Action) R60' Target centers a 15' radius lightless area for concentration up to 10 min
Daylight (D3 [Circle Spells (Grassland)] Evoc): (Action) R60' Target centers a 60' radius bright light for 1 hr
Detect Poison And Disease (D1 Divi): (Action) R30' Reveals poison, poisonous creatures, and diseases for concentration up to 10 min; 3' of wood or dirt, 1' of stone, 1" of metal, or a thin sheet of lead blocks the spell [R]
Divination (D4 [Circle Spells (Forest)] Divi): (Action) Answers a question about an event up to 7 days in the future; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Divination (D4 [Circle Spells (Grassland)] Divi): (Action) Answers a question about an event up to 7 days in the future; additional uses before a long rest add a 25% chance of failure [R]
Dream (D5 [Circle Spells (Grassland)] Illu): (Minute) Willing touched controls the dreams of a known target for 8 hr and can inflict 3d6 HP psychic and loss of the benefits of rest (save Wisdom negates)
Faerie Fire (D1 Evoc): (Action) R60' Objects and creatures in a 20' cube glow (save Dexterity negates), giving their foes advantage on attacks, for concentration up to 1 min
Find Traps (D2 Divi): (Action) R120' Reveals the presence of traps
Fog Cloud (D1 Conj): (Action) R120' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured for concentration up to 1 hr (+Level increases the radius by 20')
Freedom Of Movement (D4 [Circle Spells (Arctic)] Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr
Freedom Of Movement (D4 [Circle Spells (Coast)] Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr
Freedom Of Movement (D4 [Circle Spells (Forest)] Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr
Freedom Of Movement (D4 [Circle Spells (Grassland)] Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr
Freedom Of Movement (D4 [Circle Spells (Swamp)] Abju): (Action) Touched gains immunity to movement impediments and can escape from nonmagical restraints for 1 hr
Gaseous Form (D3 [Circle Spells (Underdark)] Tran): (Action) Touched willing creature becomes gaseous, gaining a 10' fly Speed, resistance to nonmagical damage, and advantage on Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution saves, for concentration up to 1 hr
Giant Insect (D4 Tran): (Action) R30' 10 centipedes, 5 wasps, 3 spiders, or 1 scorpion become giant and obey commands for concentration up to 10 min
Greater Invisibility (D4 [Circle Spells (Underdark)] Illu): (Action) Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 min
Hallucinatory Terrain (D4 [Circle Spells (Desert)] Illu): (10 Minutes) R300' Creates a 150' cube terrain illusion (contact or Investigation detects) for 24 hr
Haste (D3 [Circle Spells (Grassland)] Tran): (Action) R30' Willing target gains double Speed, +2 Armor Class, advantage on Dexterity saves, and an additional action to Attack, Dash, Disengage, Hide, or Use an Object each turn for concentration up to 1 min and suffers 1 rd of incapacitation afterward
Hold Person (D2 [Circle Spells (Arctic)] Ench): (Action) R60' Inflicts paralyzed (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min (+Level affects +1 target)
Ice Storm (D4 [Circle Spells (Arctic)] Evoc): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 2d8 HP bludgeoning and 4d6 HP cold (save Dexterity half) and becomes difficult terrain until the end of the next turn (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP bludgeoning)
Insect Plague (D5 Conj): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Insect Plague (D5 [Circle Spells (Desert)] Conj): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Insect Plague (D5 [Circle Spells (Grassland)] Conj): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Insect Plague (D5 [Circle Spells (Swamp)] Conj): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Insect Plague (D5 [Circle Spells (Underdark)] Conj): (Action) R300' 20' radius inflicts 4d10 HP piercing (save Constitution half) for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d10 HP)
Invisibility (D2 [Circle Spells (Grassland)] Illu): (Action) Touched becomes invisible for concentration up to 1 hr; target attacking or casting ends (+Level affects +1 target)
Lightning Bolt (D3 [Circle Spells (Mountain)] Evoc): (Action) 100'x5' line inflicts 8d6 HP lightning (save Dexterity half) and ignites unattended flammable objects (+Level inflicts +1d6 HP)
Locate Creature (D4 Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; running water blocks the spell
Locate Creature (D4 [Circle Spells (Swamp)] Divi): (Action) Reveals the location of a specified creature or species within 1000' for concentration up to 1 hr; running water blocks the spell
Mage Hand (W0 Conj): (Action) R30' Spectral hand performs minor tasks, moving up to 10 lb, for 1 min
Meld Into Stone (D3 Tran): (Action) Self steps into rock, losing sight and suffering disadvantage on hearing Perception but allowing casting spells on self, for up to 8 hr; significant partial destruction of the stone inflicts 6d6 HP bludgeoning, expulsion, and prone on self, and complete destruction increases the damage to 50 HP [R]
Meld Into Stone (D3 [Circle Spells (Mountain)] Tran): (Action) Self steps into rock, losing sight and suffering disadvantage on hearing Perception but allowing casting spells on self, for up to 8 hr; significant partial destruction of the stone inflicts 6d6 HP bludgeoning, expulsion, and prone on self, and complete destruction increases the damage to 50 HP [R]
Melf's Acid Arrow (D2 [Circle Spells (Swamp)] Evoc): (Action) R90' Ranged spell inflicts 4d4 HP acid, plus 2d4 HP at the end of the target's next turn (miss half initial HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d4 HP initial and secondary)
Mending (D0 Tran): (Minute) Touch repairs a break or tear up to 1' long
Mirror Image (D2 [Circle Spells (Coast)] Illu): (Action) 3 duplicates with Armor Class 11 allow redirecting attacks on self to a duplicate, destroying it, with an 11, 8, or 6 on a d20 while 1, 2, or 3 duplicates remain, for up to 1 min
Misty Step (D2 [Circle Spells (Coast)] Conj): (Bonus) Teleports self 30'
Pass Without Trace (D2 [Circle Spells (Grassland)] Abju): (Action) Targets in a 30' radius gain +10 Stealth and leave no tracks for concentration up to 1 hr
Passwall (D5 [Circle Spells (Mountain)] Tran): (Action) R30' Creates a 5'x8'x20' passage through wood, plaster, or stone for 1 hr
Planar Binding (D5 Abju): (Hour) R60' Binds a celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend to service (save Charisma negates) for 24 hr (+Level extends the duration to 10, 30, 180, or 366 days at level 6, 7, 8, or 9)
Plane Shift (D7 Conj): (Action) Target (save Charisma negates) or self and 8 willing others travel to another plane
Plant Growth (D3 [Circle Spells (Forest)] Tran): (Action) R150' Causes plants in a 100' radius to overgrow, slowing movement to 1/4 Speed, or enriches a half-mile radius for 1 year
Poison Spray (D0 Conj): (Action) R10' Inflicts 4d12 HP poison (save Constitution negates)
Protection From Energy (D3 [Circle Spells (Desert)] Abju): (Action) Touched gains resistance to a choice of acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder for concentration up to 1 hr
Regenerate (D7 Tran): (Minute) Touched regains 4d8+15 hit points, plus 1 hit point per rd for 1 hr, and reattaches or regrows severed parts after 2 min
Resistance (D0 Abju): (Action) Touched gains +1d4 on 1 save within concentration up to 1 min
Scrying (D5 [Circle Spells (Coast)] Divi): (10 Minutes) Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Scrying (D5 [Circle Spells (Swamp)] Divi): (10 Minutes) Self sees and hears a chosen target (save Wisdom, modified by degree of familiarity, negates for 24 hr) or known location for concentration up to 10 min
Shillelagh (D0 Tran): (Bonus) Held club gains +8 magical attacks that inflict 1d8+2 HP for 1 min
Silence (D2 [Circle Spells (Desert)] Illu): (Action) R120' 20' radius blocks sound for concentration up to 10 min [R]
Sleep (W1 Ench): (Action) R90' 20' radius puts to sleep 5d8 hit points of creatures, starting with those with the least hit points, for 1 min; damage or shaking awakens (+Level affects +2d8 hit points of creatures)
Sleet Storm (D3 [Circle Spells (Arctic)] Conj): (Action) R150' 40' radius becomes heavily obscured, douses exposed flames, becomes difficult terrain, and inflicts prone (save Dexterity negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Slow (D3 [Circle Spells (Arctic)] Tran): (Action) R120' 6 targets in a 40' cube suffer half Speed, -2 Armor Class and Dexterity saves, loss of reactions, no more than 1 action or attack per turn, and a 50% chance of a 1-rd delay on spell effects (save Wisdom negates; additional saves each rd end) for concentration up to 1 min
Spider Climb (D2 [Circle Spells (Forest)] Tran): (Action) Touched willing creature can crawl on walls and ceilings and gains a climb Speed equal to its Speed for concentration up to 1 hr
Spider Climb (D2 [Circle Spells (Mountain)] Tran): (Action) Touched willing creature can crawl on walls and ceilings and gains a climb Speed equal to its Speed for concentration up to 1 hr
Spider Climb (D2 [Circle Spells (Underdark)] Tran): (Action) Touched willing creature can crawl on walls and ceilings and gains a climb Speed equal to its Speed for concentration up to 1 hr
Spike Growth (D2 Tran): (Action) R150' Camouflaged spikes in a 20' radius inflict difficult terrain and 2d4 HP piercing per 5' movement for concentration up to 10 min
Spike Growth (D2 [Circle Spells (Arctic)] Tran): (Action) R150' Camouflaged spikes in a 20' radius inflict difficult terrain and 2d4 HP piercing per 5' movement for concentration up to 10 min
Spike Growth (D2 [Circle Spells (Mountain)] Tran): (Action) R150' Camouflaged spikes in a 20' radius inflict difficult terrain and 2d4 HP piercing per 5' movement for concentration up to 10 min
Stinking Cloud (D3 [Circle Spells (Swamp)] Conj): (Action) R90' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured and inflicts loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stinking Cloud (D3 [Circle Spells (Underdark)] Conj): (Action) R90' 20' radius becomes heavily obscured and inflicts loss of actions for 1 rd (save Constitution negates) for concentration up to 1 min
Stone Shape (D4 [Circle Spells (Mountain)] Tran): (Action) Reshapes touched 5' cube of stone
Stone Shape (D4 [Circle Spells (Underdark)] Tran): (Action) Reshapes touched 5' cube of stone
Stoneskin (D4 [Circle Spells (Mountain)] Abju): (Action) Touched gains resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing for concentration up to 1 hr
Sunbeam (D6 Evoc): (Action) Self emits a 30' bright sunlight, and a 5'x60' line inflicts 6d8 HP radiant and blindness until the start of the next turn (save Constitution half HP only) each rd, for concentration up to 1 min
Thorn Whip (D0 Tran): (Action) R30' Melee spell attack inflicts 4d6 HP piercing and pulls a Large or smaller target 10'
Thunderwave (D1 Evoc): (Action) 15' cube inflicts 2d8 HP thunder and pushes 10' (save Constitution half HP only) (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Tree Stride (D5 [Circle Spells (Forest)] Conj): (Action) Allows self to use 10' of movement to step into and out of a pair of similar trees within 500' once per turn for concentration up to 1 min
True Resurrection (D9 Necr): (Hour) Restores life and full hit points to and removes all diseases, poisons, wounds, maims, and curses from a willing touched corpse or named creature dead up to 200 years
Wall Of Stone (D5 [Circle Spells (Desert)] Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels (save Dexterity allows using a reaction to avoid entrapment), with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Wall Of Stone (D5 [Circle Spells (Mountain)] Evoc): (Action) R120' Creates 10 contiguous 10'x10'x6" or 10'x20'x3" stone panels (save Dexterity allows using a reaction to avoid entrapment), with Armor Class 15 and 30 hit points each, for concentration up to 10 min; concentrating for 10 min makes the wall permanent
Wall Of Thorns (D6 Conj): (Action) R120' Creates a 60'x10'x5' wall or a 20'x20'x5' ring that inflicts 7d8 HP piercing (save Dexterity half) initially, plus 1/4 Speed and 7d8 HP slashing to creatures passing through (save Dexterity half) for concentration up to 10 min (+Level inflicts +1d8 HP)
Water Breathing (D3 [Circle Spells (Coast)] Tran): (Action) R30' 10 willing targets can breathe underwater for 24 hr [R]
Water Walk (D3 Tran): (Action) R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr [R]
Water Walk (D3 [Circle Spells (Coast)] Tran): (Action) R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr [R]
Water Walk (D3 [Circle Spells (Swamp)] Tran): (Action) R30' 10 willing targets can traverse liquids for 1 hr [R]
Web (D2 [Circle Spells (Underdark)] Conj): (Action) R60' 20' cube inflicts difficult terrain and restrains creatures (save Dexterity negates; Strength frees) for concentration up to 1 hr; burning the web inflicts 2d4 HP fire
Magic Notes:
Archdruid: Has increased Wild Shape effects
Bonus Cantrip (Circle Of The Land): Knows an additional Druid cantrip
Circle Forms: Has increased Wild Shape effects
Archdruid: Casting spells requires no verbal, somatic, or cost-free material components
Beast Spells: Can cast spells requiring no material components during Wild Shape
Combat Wild Shape: Can use Wild Shape as a bonus action/While using Wild Shape, can use a bonus action and expend a spell slot to regain 1d8 hit points per slot level
Elemental Adept (Cold): Spells that inflict cold damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Adept (Thunder): Spells that inflict thunder damage ignore resistance and treat 1s as 2s on damage dice
Elemental Wild Shape: Can expend 2 Wild Shape uses to become an elemental
Magic Initiate (Wizard): Knows 2 Wizard cantrips and can cast a chosen W1 spell without expending a spell slot once per long rest
Natural Recovery: Can recover 10 spell slot levels (level 5 maximum) during a short rest once per long rest
Spellcasting: Can cast spells from the druid spell list and cast spells marked with [R] using a ritual; regains expended spell slots after a long rest
Thousand Forms: Can cast Alter Self without expending a spell slot
Wild Shape: Can transform into a CR 6 creature for 10 hr unlimited times per short rest
Notes
Validation Errors: Selectable Feature Allocation: 1 available vs. 9 allocated
